title: Chrysophyllum grisebachii
taxonomy: Chrysophyllum grisebachii belongs to the family Sapotaceae and is classified under the kingdom Plantae. It is a species of flowering plant native to Cuba. The plant is further classified as a member of the genus Chrysophyllum and the order Ebenales. Its classification also includes being a part of the phylum Magnoliophyta and the class Magnoliopsida. Chrysophyllum grisebachii is a deciduous tree, and its classification reflects its unique characteristics and distribution.
